title: ProjectSubstratePostureSummary
description: Summary posture projection for canonical project-substrate contract validation and snapshot identity binding.

active_runecontext_version.description: Repository-declared RuneContext substrate version, when parseable.

validation_state.description: Validated contract posture state for the authoritative repository root.

compatibility_posture.description: Release-policy compatibility posture derived from validated repository substrate contract state.

normal_operation_allowed.description: True only when compatibility_posture allows normal RuneCode operation.

supported_contract_version_min.description: Lowest project-substrate contract version supported by this RuneCode release.

supported_contract_version_max.description: Highest project-substrate contract version supported by this RuneCode release.

recommended_contract_version.description: Recommended project-substrate contract version target for this RuneCode release.

supported_runecontext_version_min.description: Lowest supported repository-declared RuneContext substrate version for this RuneCode release.

supported_runecontext_version_max.description: Highest supported repository-declared RuneContext substrate version for this RuneCode release.

recommended_runecontext_version.description: Recommended repository substrate version target for this RuneCode release.

reason_codes.description: Stable deterministic reason codes when validation is not fully valid.

blocked_reason_codes.description: Stable deterministic reason-code set explaining why normal operation is blocked for current posture.

validated_snapshot_digest.description: Validated canonical snapshot digest identity when posture is valid.

project_context_identity_digest.description: Project-context identity digest bound to validated canonical substrate snapshot.

operator_decision_path.description: Reserved broker-owned typed operator-decision path projection for future dashboard/equivalent RuneCode setup and lifecycle prompts. This is presentation-only and non-authoritative.
